章节结构.子节名称: 研究背景与问题定义 (Background & Problem Definition)
章节结构.核心任务: 确立研究领域的宏观背景，说明研究问题在实际应用或理论中的重要价值，并明确定义本文要解决的具体问题或挑战。

章节结构.子节名称: 现有方法及其局限性 (State-of-the-Art & Limitations)
章节结构.核心任务: 系统回顾当前解决该问题的主流方法或技术，深入剖析它们在特定场景、假设条件或数据获取方面的固有缺陷和痛点（Research Gap）。

章节结构.子节名称: 本文方法与核心思想 (Proposed Method & Core Idea)
章节结构.核心任务: 针对上述局限性，提出本文的创新解决方案，概述核心算法、技术路线或理论框架，并解释其为何能克服现有方法的缺陷。

章节结构.子节名称: 主要贡献与成果概述 (Main Contributions & Summary)
章节结构.核心任务: 以列表或总结的形式，清晰、明确地列出本文的核心创新点、理论突破以及实验验证的主要成果，为后续章节奠定基调。

Introduction.内容逻辑: 采用经典的“倒金字塔（漏斗式）”逻辑结构，从宏观到微观层层递进。首先通过“大背景”确立研究领域的广泛应用价值；接着聚焦到“具体任务”，并系统梳理“现有方法”，通过转折词（如However, Unfortunately, Despite）引出当前技术的“核心痛点（Gap）”；随后顺理成章地提出“本文方法”，阐述如何针对性地解决上述痛点；最后以“贡献列表”收尾，明确本文的创新边界。各子节之间通过“提出问题（背景）-> 分析问题（局限性）-> 解决问题（本文方法）-> 总结成果（贡献）”的严密逻辑链条进行过渡，确保读者能够清晰理解研究的动机和价值。
论证手法: 数据与引用支撑：使用具体统计数据（如“占全球能源使用的三分之一”、“90%的时间在室内”）和权威文献引用，确立研究背景的紧迫性和重要性。
分类与对比分析：将现有方法进行系统分类（如侵入式/半侵入式/非侵入式，主动传感器/深度学习），并对比其在特定场景下的优缺点，凸显现有技术的盲区。
因果推导：深入剖析问题产生的根本原因（如“因为透明/镜面表面引入误导性的视觉信息，导致深度估计困难”），使问题的提出更具说服力。
具象化举例：通过列举生活或工业中的具体实例（如“建筑玻璃窗”、“汽车反光表面”、“Lytro相机”），将抽象的学术问题转化为直观的实际应用场景。

研究背景与问题定义.句式: In [context], [phenomenon/problem] are increasingly acute challenges / remain a challenging problem for [target field].
研究背景与问题定义.示例: In modern society, global climate change and energy scarcity are increasingly acute challenges.

研究背景与问题定义.句式: Specifically, among the many tasks involved in [field], accurately [task] remains a challenging problem... yet necessary for [application].
研究背景与问题定义.示例: Specifically, among the many tasks involved in Spatial AI, accurately estimating depth information on these surfaces remains a challenging problem... yet necessary for proper interaction...

现有方法及其局限性.句式: However, most current [methods] support only [assumption/condition], making them unreliable for [target scenario].
现有方法及其局限性.示例: However, most current depth estimation methods support only Lambertian scenes, making them unreliable for glossy surfaces.

现有方法及其局限性.句式: Despite this substantial [effort/expenditure], many [users/systems] remain dissatisfied with / exhibit inherent limitations in [task].
现有方法及其局限性.示例: Despite this substantial energy expenditure, many occupants remain dissatisfied with the building’s indoor thermal environment.

本文方法与核心思想.句式: In this paper, we present a [method/algorithm] that explicitly models / addresses [target problem].
本文方法与核心思想.示例: In this paper, we present a depth and reflectance estimation algorithm that explicitly models spatially varying BRDFs from light-field cameras.

本文方法与核心思想.句式: Purposely, this paper proposes a [adjective] strategy for [goal], driven by the observation that [key insight].
本文方法与核心思想.示例: Purposely, this paper proposes a simple yet effective strategy for obtaining training data... Driven by the observation that ToM objects alone are responsible for misleading recent monocular networks...

主要贡献与成果概述.示例: Our main contributions are: 1) A generalization of optical flow to the non-Lambertian case... 2) A depth estimation algorithm for light-field cameras...

主要贡献与成果概述.句式: Finally, we demonstrate extensive [experiments/real-world examples] of [task] using [tools/datasets].
主要贡献与成果概述.示例: Finally, we demonstrate extensive real-world examples of shape and reflectance estimation using commercial light-field cameras.

章节结构.子节名称: 直接相关领域/主流方法 (如 Depth from Light-Field Cameras / Monocular Depth Estimation)
章节结构.核心任务: 梳理与本文任务最直接相关的现有主流方法，按技术流派或时间顺序回顾，并重点指出其在特定条件（如非朗伯体、透明/镜面表面）下的局限性。

章节结构.子节名称: 密切相关理论/对比技术路线 (如 Differential Motion Theory / Stereo Matching)
章节结构.核心任务: 探讨本文依赖的底层理论基础或另一条主流技术路线，通过详细的条件对比，明确本文方法在理论推导、假设前提或架构设计上的核心差异与改进。

章节结构.子节名称: 特定应用场景/相关数据集/广泛背景 (如 BRDF Estimation & Shape from Shading / Non-Lambertian Object Perception)
章节结构.核心任务: 回顾本文针对的特定难点（如材质估计、非朗伯体感知）及相关数据集资源，强调现有数据的缺陷（如缺乏深度标签），从而凸显本文在解决该特定问题或数据层面的独创性。

Related Work.内容逻辑: 整体呈现“漏斗式”与“并列递进”相结合的逻辑。子节之间通过小标题直接切换，从“最直接相关的核心任务”过渡到“支撑理论/对比路线”，最后落脚于“特定难点/数据集”。子节内部通常按“时间顺序（早期方法->近期进展）”或“技术流派（如2D->3D架构，参数->非参数模型）”展开。在梳理完前人工作后，统一使用转折词（However, In contrast）引出前人方法的局限性（Gap），并顺理成章地过渡到本文的动机和贡献，形成“回顾-批判-提出本文方案”的闭环。
论证手法: 归纳分类：将大量文献按技术流派或架构设计进行分类概括，避免流水账式罗列（如将网络分为2D和3D架构，将模型分为参数和非参数）。
对比分析：将前人方法的假设前提、输入条件或运动方式与本文进行直接对比，突出本文的优越性和适用性（如对比微分运动中的平移与旋转）。
痛点剖析（Gap Analysis）：精准指出前人方法在特定物理条件或极端场景下的失效原因，证明问题的挑战性（如指出二向色模型对金属失效，或立体匹配的病态本质）。
列举与数据支撑：列举代表性算法、模型或数据集，并用具体数据说明现有资源的规模与缺陷，增强论证的客观性（如列举数据集包含的图片数量及缺失的标签类型）。

关键句式模板.引入领域/早期工作: 模板：Many [methods] have been proposed. / Early methods used [technique] for [task]. | 原文示例：Many depth estimation methods for light-field cameras have been proposed. / Early methods used CNNs for pixel-level regression.
关键句式模板.描述近期进展: 模板：Recently, there are some works that try to deal with [problem]. / More recent approaches such as [A, B, C] use [technique]. | 原文示例：Recently, there are some works that try to deal with specularity. / More recent approaches such as AdaBins, DPT, and MiDaS use adaptive bins...
关键句式模板.指出局限性: 模板：However, most of them rely on [assumption] and work poorly on [specific case]. / However, due to [reason], dealing with [problem] remains a very challenging problem. | 原文示例：However, most of them rely on the Lambertian assumption and work poorly on glossy surfaces. / However, due to its inherently ill-posed nature, dealing with non-Lambertian surfaces... remains a very challenging problem.
关键句式模板.强调本文差异/贡献: 模板：In contrast, our model can work on [condition]. / To the best of our knowledge, we are not aware of any previous [method] that can handle [specific case]. | 原文示例：In contrast, our model can work on general 1-lobe BRDFs... / ...we are not aware of any previous single-view depth estimation network that can handle ToM surfaces.
关键句式模板.最相近工作对比: 模板：Our theoretical contributions are most closely related to [work]. / For joint [task], the closest to our work is [work]. | 原文示例：Our theoretical contributions are most closely related to the differential theory proposed by Chandraker. / For joint shape and BRDF estimation, the closest to our work is [5] described above.

章节结构.core_task: 介绍整体框架(TLA-DETR)、研究目标(解决红外数据稀缺下的检测定位)及核心原理(两阶段跨域迁移学习)。

章节结构.sub_section: 3.2 Stage 1: Pre-training on Visible-light Datasets (第一阶段：可见光预训练)
章节结构.core_task: 详细阐述在大规模可见光数据集上预训练特征提取(CNN backbone)和检测架构(DETR Transformer)的具体网络结构和训练过程。

章节结构.sub_section: 3.3 Stage 2: Cross-Domain Transfer Learning Strategy (第二阶段：跨域迁移学习策略)
章节结构.core_task: 深入解析独特的迁移学习技巧，包括冻结CNN backbone、Transformer编码器/解码器参数共享以及仅微调FFNs的具体实现和理论依据。

章节结构.sub_section: 3.4 Infrared Behavior Detection under Few-shot Conditions (少样本条件下的红外行为检测)
章节结构.core_task: 说明模型在红外域推理时的具体流程，以及如何利用迁移后的特征进行高效的热适应行为检测和定位。

章节结构.sub_section: 3.5 Loss Functions and Optimization (损失函数与优化)
章节结构.core_task: 定义两阶段训练中使用的具体损失函数(如分类损失、边界框回归损失)及优化器设置。

Methodology.内容逻辑: 采用“总-分”与“时间/流程顺序”相结合的逻辑结构。首先通过Overview进行全局概览，明确“两阶段”和“迁移学习技巧”的核心创新点；随后按照模型训练的时间顺序，先展开第一阶段（可见光预训练）的基础架构构建，再重点展开第二阶段（红外域迁移）的核心策略（冻结、共享、微调），层层递进；最后补充推理流程和损失函数等训练细节。各子节之间通过“In the first stage...”、“Subsequently...”、“To achieve efficient domain adaptation...”等流程性和目的性过渡词进行自然衔接，确保读者能够清晰理解模型从源域到目标域的完整生命周期。
论证手法: 原理解释与动机论证：在Overview中明确指出采用该框架是为了'address the challenge of... under infrared data scarcity'，通过点明痛点（数据稀缺）来论证两阶段迁移学习的必要性。
机制拆解与细节支撑：将复杂的迁移学习策略拆解为三个具体操作（freezing CNN backbone + parameter sharing + fine-tuning FFNs），通过具体的操作细节支撑'unique transfer learning trick'这一观点。
隐含对比论证：通过强调'freezing'和'fine-tuning only'，隐含对比了传统的全参数微调方法，论证该策略在few-shot learning条件下防止过拟合、实现高效域适应的优势。
数学公式与图表辅助（推断）：在后续具体子节中，通常会使用网络结构图直观展示两阶段的数据流向，并使用数学公式严格定义FFNs的微调过程和损失函数的计算方式。

框架概述 (Overview).template: [Model Name] employs a [Method Type] framework, aiming to address the challenge of [Task/Problem] under [Specific Condition].
框架概述 (Overview).example: TLA-DETR employs a two-stage cross-domain transfer learning framework, aiming to address the challenge of efficient detection and location of indoor thermal adaptation behaviors under infrared data scarcity (few-shot learning conditions).

核心原理/机制说明 (Core Principle).template: Its core principle involves [Action 1/Stage 1], then [Action 2/Stage 2] through [Specific Technique/Trick] ([Detail 1] + [Detail 2] + [Detail 3]) to achieve [Ultimate Goal].
核心原理/机制说明 (Core Principle).example: Its core principle involves pre-training a robust feature extraction and detection architecture on large-scale visible-light datasets, then transferring visual information to the infrared domain through a unique transfer learning trick (freezing the CNN backbone + parameter sharing of the Transformer encoder/decoder + fine-tuning only the FFNs) to achieve efficient domain adaptation.

阶段展开 (Stage Description - 基于原文逻辑推断).template: In the [first/second] stage, we [specific operation] to [purpose]. Specifically, the [module name] is designed to...
阶段展开 (Stage Description - 基于原文逻辑推断).example: In the second stage, we transfer visual information to the infrared domain. Specifically, the CNN backbone is frozen to preserve general visual features...

策略论证 (Strategy Justification - 基于原文逻辑推断).template: To achieve [goal] under [condition], we propose [strategy], which prevents [negative effect] by [specific action].
策略论证 (Strategy Justification - 基于原文逻辑推断).example: To achieve efficient domain adaptation under few-shot conditions, we fine-tune only the FFNs, which prevents overfitting by keeping the majority of parameters frozen.

章节结构.子节名称: 实验设置与参数选择 (Experimental Setup and Parameter Selection)
章节结构.核心任务: 介绍实验所用的数据集、评估指标、实现细节，并通过预实验或控制变量确定模型的最优超参数默认值。

章节结构.子节名称: 主实验与对比评估 (Main Results and Comparative Evaluation)
章节结构.核心任务: 在公开基准数据集和合成数据集上，与现有先进（SOTA）方法进行定量指标对比和定性视觉结果对比，证明整体性能的优越性。
通过移除、替换或修改网络中的关键组件（如双分支结构、自适应模块），验证各个创新设计对最终性能的贡献度。

章节结构.子节名称: 深入分析与局限性探讨 (In-depth Analysis and Limitations)
章节结构.核心任务: 通过控制变量实验探究模型对特定物理属性（如透明度、反射率）的敏感性，并客观总结方法的优势与在极端条件下的失效情况。

Experiments.内容逻辑: 整体遵循“从基础设置到核心验证，再到深入剖析”的递进逻辑。首先交代实验环境与参数基准，确保研究的可复现性；接着通过主实验（定量+定性）确立方法在整体性能上的SOTA地位，证明“方法有效”；随后通过消融实验向内剖析，证明所提创新模块的不可或缺性，解释“为什么有效”；最后通过控制变量等深入实验探究模型的边界、鲁棒性及局限性，形成完整且客观的闭环论证。各子节间通常通过“在确立了整体性能后，我们进一步验证...”或“为了探究...的敏感性”等逻辑连词自然过渡。
论证手法: 定量数据支撑：使用MSE、BadPix等客观评估指标在表格中进行横向对比，用具体数值证明精度提升。
定性视觉对比：展示深度估计结果图及误差图（Error maps），直观显示边缘连续性、伪影消除效果及多层场景分离能力。
控制变量法：固定其他条件，改变单一物理变量（如透明度比例），观察并对比不同算法的性能衰减情况，证明模型的鲁棒性。
消融对比验证：通过控制网络结构的增减，对比性能下降幅度，从反面证明特定模块（如自适应模块）的必要性。
客观辩证分析：在展示方法优势（Strength）的同时，主动暴露极端情况下的弱点（Weakness/Failure cases），增强论文的严谨性和可信度。

关键句式模板.参数设置与选择: Since there are adjustable parameters in [Method], we list the most important optimal parameter selections... We generate a set of training data for different scenes and test the control variables on them. Thus a group of optimal parameters are selected...
关键句式模板.定量与定性对比: The proposed [Method] achieves state-of-the-art depth accuracy in terms of the average [Metric] and [Metric] scores on both the public dataset and generated data. / Fig. X shows estimation results and error maps. At the edges of [Objects], our algorithm achieves good depth continuity.
关键句式模板.控制变量与敏感性分析: In order to explore the sensitivity of the algorithms to [Property], we conduct a control variable experiment on the data [Dataset] with different [Property]. / As illustrated in Fig. X, with the decrease in [Property], the estimation results of the algorithms gradually become inaccurate.
关键句式模板.优缺点与局限性总结: The strength of our method is that it is not significantly affected by [Factor] due to the proposed [Module]. / The weakness of our method is that it is challenging to reconstruct [Target] when the [Condition] is too [Extreme].

章节结构.子节名称: 研究总结与贡献回顾 (Summary of Contributions and Findings)
章节结构.核心任务: 重申研究背景与目的，概括提出的核心方法、模型或数据集，并总结主要的理论发现、实验结果及其相较于现有方法的优势与领域贡献。

章节结构.子节名称: 局限性与未来工作 (Limitations and Future Work)
章节结构.核心任务: 客观指出当前研究在数据、场景、方法或理论上的局限性，并基于这些不足或研究中发现的新问题，提出具体、可行的未来研究方向和改进计划。

Conclusion.内容逻辑: 整体遵循“回顾过去/现在 -> 展望未来”的递进逻辑。首先以全局视角概括本文的核心工作（提出方法/数据集），接着深入到具体的技术细节、理论推导和实验验证以巩固贡献，最后通过转折或顺承关系引出当前工作的边界（局限性），并自然过渡到未来的研究计划。过渡方式上，总结部分常以“In this paper/To address...”开篇，通过“Experiments validate/A series of experiments...”过渡到结果；未来工作部分则通过“Finally/A promising future direction/Future implementation should focus on...”等明确的信号词进行段落或语意上的切换。
论证手法: 对比论证：将本文方法与现有基线或传统方法进行对比，凸显本文方法的独特优势（如：'while this is not possible using [5, 6, 7]'，'abandons conventional... instead proposes...'）。
数据与实验支撑：通过提及实验验证的数据集、具体指标或类别数量来证明方法的有效性和优越性（如：'validate our algorithm on most material types in the MERL dataset'，'achieves high-accuracy recognition... of 26-category'）。
理论推导印证：简述理论层面的发现或推导过程，为方法的设计提供坚实的数学或物理依据（如：'By utilizing the differential motion theory, we show that...'）。
填补空白强调：明确指出本文工作解决了领域内长期存在的痛点或缺失，确立研究的不可替代性（如：'fills the gap in high-quality annotated data'）。

研究总结与贡献回顾: In this paper, we propose a novel [method] for [task] from [data/source]. (原文：In this paper, we propose a novel BRDF-invariant shape and reflectance estimation method for glossy surfaces from light-field cameras.)

To address the core requirements for [task], this work constructs [dataset], proposes and validates [model] – a framework for [purpose]. (原文：To address the core requirements for intelligent detection..., this work constructs TABD, proposes and validates TLA-DETR – a framework for identifying...)

We have proposed an effective methodology for [task] to deal with [problem]. (原文：We have proposed an effective methodology for training depth estimation networks to deal with transparent and mirror surfaces.)

A series of experiments conducted on [dataset] validate the superiority of [model] across multiple dimensions. (原文：A series of experiments conducted on TABD validate the superiority of TLA-DETR across multiple dimensions.)
局限性与未来工作: Finally, since we showed that [limitation/finding], future work includes [future task], i.e., [specific goal]. (原文：Finally, since we showed that there is actually inherent ambiguity..., future work includes deriving its ambiguity-space, i.e., what is the precise set...)

A promising future direction would be to extend our technique to [new area] to get better [results] in the presence of [condition]. (原文：A promising future direction would be to extend our technique to instance segmentation masks to get better virtual depth maps in the presence of multiple ToM objects...)

Future implementation should focus on integrating [component] with [system], where [mechanism] to achieve [goal]. (原文：Future implementation should focus on integrating this behavioral feedback loop with standard PMV calculations, where recognized behaviors dynamically adjust model parameters to achieve higher assessment accuracy.)

The current validation is based on [limitation]. We will consider [factors] to ensure robust performance across [scenarios], and strive to explore broader applications... (原文：The current validation is based on a limited participant group and a single building context. We will consider individual differences and environmental diversity to ensure robust performance...)
